text:
Author: tabthorpe
Date: Tue Oct  8 16:55:28 2013
New Revision: 329812
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/329812

Log:
  - Update to 5.2
  
  PR:		ports/182795
  Submitted by:	James Bailie <jimmy@mammothcheese.ca> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/lang/munger/Makefile
  head/lang/munger/distinfo

Modified: head/lang/munger/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/munger/Makefile	Tue Oct  8 16:47:00 2013	(r329811)
+++ head/lang/munger/Makefile	Tue Oct  8 16:55:28 2013	(r329812)
@@ -2,14 +2,14 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	5.1
+PORTVERSION=	5.2
 CATEGORIES=	lang
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/
 
 MAINTAINER=	jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
 COMMENT=	Static lisp interpreter with text processing abilities
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	tre.5:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libtre
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libtre.so:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libtre
 
 DATADIR=	${PREFIX}/share/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}

==============================================================================
